title: Aclorol 1M 5V Motion Sensor COB LED Strip Light USB Powered COB LED Tape Dimmable Movement Activated Auto ON/Off Light Indoor Under Bed Lights for Stairs Closet Mirror DIY Lighting Neutral White 4000K
features: Brighter & Softer: Compared with ordinary SMD LED light strips, Aclorol Neutral white COB USB LED strip lights have more densely distributed LED beads(320leds/m), which creates brighter, softer, spotless and ultra-even lighting glow. Not as spotty, suitable for lightening bright screens and easily cover the dark edges or area of a room.

LED Motion Sensor Light Strip: 1M USB motion sensor COB LED strip, the PIR sensor working distance is 3M and 120 degree angle. At night or in dark places, It lights up when it catches you moving, providing you with bright but not blinding ambient lighting. And You don't need to manually switch off, Not only is it more energy efficient but also it increases your safety and convenience

Motion Sensing & Always-on Mode: Day/Night mode and Always-on mode, Day/night mode is automatically switched on when human movement is detected, the difference being whether or not it is affected by ambient light Night mode requires the sensor to work in a very dark environment, while day mode is not affected by ambient light. You can also choose the Always-on Mode mode if you want

Multiple Settings: The COB LED strip has 4 timer settings: 10/30/60/120 seconds, you can set the light strip to illuminate for designated seconds after each motion sensing and then turn off automatically. In addition, you can also long press the designated button on the controller to steplessly dim or brighten the COB flex strip to meet the different lighting needs of different people.

Convenient and Easy to Install: With a 1.5m extra-long USB power cable, you no longer have to worry about the limitations of short USB cables! The 5V cob light strip can be directly plugged into USB sockets, USB chargers, power banks, computers, TVs and other devices with USB sockets, without the need for a bulky adapter, greatly increasing your convenience

Widly Use: This 8mm cob high density light strip can be cut along the cutting line(every 1.6cm), with a strong self-adhesive tape on the back. The attachable and cuttable feature gives you a lot of flexibility, and it bends freely. you can easily install it in any places, like stairs, under bed, kitchen, cabinets, wardrobe, door frame, TV backlight, furniture lighting, pantry
description: Product Description motion sensor cob led strip light 1M 5V USB-Powered Previous page Brighter & Softer 150cm long usb cable Next page 1 COB Light 2 Plug & Play Flexible Led Strip Lights Simple to bent at any angle Strong Self-adhesive Easy to install on smooth surfaces USB Plug Plug and play quick installation without steps, very easy and quick for installation. PIR Motion Sensor At night or in dark places, It lights up when it catches you moving, providing you with bright but not blinding ambient lighting.
